mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS lineNo , SEMINAR_LOG_ID AS seminarLogId , SMNR_ID AS seminarId , STD_ID AS stdNo , SDTTM AS startDttm , EDTTM AS endDttm , CNTN_DVC_TYCD AS deviceTypeCd , ATND_SCNDS AS atndTime , ATND_STSCD AS atndCd , USER_ID AS userId , RGTR_IP AS regIp , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt FROM TB_LMS_SEMINAR_LOG WHERE 1 = 1
